name: Gasser's Golf Driving Range & Miniature Golf
about: Gasser's Golf Driving Range & Miniature Golf is a multi-faceted golf venue featuring a driving range, 19-hole mini golf course, snack bar, and indoor golf simulator. The simulator bay utilizes TrackMan™ technology for realistic practice sessions and virtual play on prestigious golf courses. The facility also offers PGA professional instruction with packages for private lessons and video swing analysis. The venue is equipped with a covered patio and outdoor eatery that can host private parties and corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan™ technology providing accurate shot data and feedback
Ability to play on some of the most prestigious golf courses in the world
Covered patio and outdoor eatery creating a complete experience for groups
PGA professional instruction available for personalized training
19-hole mini golf course with unique features like a waterfall and gristmill

food_and_drink.notes: Snack bar and grill offering food and refreshments
